name: @armyc2.c5isr.renderer/mil-sym-ts-web
description: MIL-STD-2525 D/E symbol rendering TypeScript library

scripts.buildNode: npm run build && npm run packNode
scripts.buildWeb: npm run build && npm run packWeb
scripts.packNode: shx cp package.packNode.json dist-node/package.json && shx cp README.md dist-node/README.md && shx cp LICENSE dist-node/LICENSE && cd dist-node && npm pack
scripts.packWeb: shx cp package.packWeb.json dist/package.json && shx cp README.md dist/README.md && shx cp LICENSE dist/LICENSE && cd dist && npm pack

author: C5ISR ESI
